calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-12-2018 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-15-2017 Set For Trial On Aug-06-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Motion To Amend Complaint To Substitute True Names For Fictitious Names; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Todd Vigus; [Proposed] Order Filed Concurrently Herewith
Off Calendar Jan-16-2018 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Marc T. Cefalu, Esq. of Cox Wootton Lerner Griffin & Hansen LLP, T:415.438.4600, for defendant/opposing party;
No other appearance.

RULING: There being no objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF HARLEYSVILLE LAKE STATES INSURANCE COMPANY's Motion To Amend Complaint To Substitute True Names For For Does 1-3 is denied without prejudice to refiling if it can remedy the deficiencies in its motion papers. Harleysville fails to provide any facts, as opposed to conclusions, that support its contention that "Upon recent investigation Plaintiff has become aware of the need to amend its Complaint" to allege the true names of Does 1-3.

ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-31-2017 Set For Trial On Apr-02-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Jun-14-2017 Off Calendar
